goal: exists(k0: G) { s.contains(k0) and f.hom(k0) = H.1 }
proof: function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0]) { T0.1 ∈ x0 }[G](s)
function(x0: G) { not (x0 ∈ s and H.1 = f.hom(x0)) }(G.1)
let w0: G satisfy { w0 ∈ s and H.1 = f.hom(w0) }
function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T0, T2], x2: T2) { exists(k0: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and x1.hom(k0) = x2 } = subgroup_image_contains[T0, T2](x1, x0, x2) }[G, H](s, f, H.1)
function[T0: Group](x0: T0 -> Bool) { identity_constraint[T0](x0) = x0(T0.1) }[H](subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s))

goal: exists(k0: G) { s.contains(k0) and f.hom(k0) = a }
proof: function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T0, T2], x2: T2) { exists(k0: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and x1.hom(k0) = x2 } = subgroup_image_contains[T0, T2](x1, x0, x2) }[G, H](s, f, a)

goal: exists(k0: G) { s.contains(k0) and f.hom(k0) = b }
proof: function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T0, T2], x2: T2) { exists(k0: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and x1.hom(k0) = x2 } = subgroup_image_contains[T0, T2](x1, x0, x2) }[G, H](s, f, b)

goal: exists(k0: G) { s.contains(k0) and f.hom(k0) = a * b }
proof: function(x0: G) { not (x0 ∈ s and a * b = f.hom(x0)) }(x * y)
let w0: G satisfy { w0 ∈ s and a * b = f.hom(w0) }
function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T0, T2], x2: T2) { exists(k0: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and x1.hom(k0) = x2 } = subgroup_image_contains[T0, T2](x1, x0, x2) }[G, H](s, f, a * b)
function[T0: Group](x0: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1) or not x0(x2) or x0(x1 * x2) } = closure_constraint[T0](x0) }[H](subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s))
let w0: H satisfy { exists(k0: H) { subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, w0) and subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, k0) and not subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, w0 * k0) } }
let w1: H satisfy { subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, w0) and subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, w1) and not subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, w0 * w1) }
let w2: H satisfy { subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, w0) and subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, w2) and not subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, w0 * w2) }
function(x0: H, x1: H) { not subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, x0) or not subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, x1) or subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, x0 * x1) }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: G) { s.contains(k0) and f.hom(k0) = a }
proof: function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T0, T2], x2: T2) { exists(k0: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and x1.hom(k0) = x2 } = subgroup_image_contains[T0, T2](x1, x0, x2) }[G, H](s, f, a)

goal: exists(k0: G) { s.contains(k0) and f.hom(k0) = a.inverse }
proof: function(x0: G) { not (x0 ∈ s and a.inverse = f.hom(x0)) }(x.inverse)
let w0: G satisfy { w0 ∈ s and a.inverse = f.hom(w0) }
function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T0, T2], x2: T2) { exists(k0: T0) { k0 ∈ x0 and x1.hom(k0) = x2 } = subgroup_image_contains[T0, T2](x1, x0, x2) }[G, H](s, f, a.inverse)
function[T0: Group](x0: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { not x0(x1) or x0(x1.inverse) } = inverse_constraint[T0](x0) }[H](subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s))
let w0: H satisfy { subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, w0) and not subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, w0.inverse) }
function(x0: H) { not subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, x0) or subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, x0.inverse) }(w0)

function[T0: Group](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (identity_constraint[T0](x0) and closure_constraint[T0](x0) and inverse_constraint[T0](x0)) = subgroup_constraint[T0](x0) }[H](subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s))
function[T0: Group](x0: T0 -> Bool) { not Subgroup.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: Subgroup[T0]) { Subgroup.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[Subgroup[T0]](k0) } }[H](subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s))

goal: subgroup_image[G, H](f, s).contains(y) = subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, y)
proof: function[T0: Group, T1: Group](x0: GroupHom[T1, T0], x1: Subgroup[T1]) { Option.some[Subgroup[T0]](subgroup_image[T1, T0](x0, x1)) = Subgroup.new[T0](subgroup_image_contains[T1, T0](x0, x1)) }[H, G](f, s)

function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[Subgroup[T0]](x0) != Subgroup.new[T0](x1) or x2 ∈ x0 = x1(x2) }[H](subgroup_image[G, H](f, s), subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s), y)

goal: subgroup_image_contains[G, H](f, s, y) = exists(k0: G) { s.contains(k0) and f.hom(k0) = y }

proof: function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: Subgroup[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subgroup_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[H](subgroup_image[G, H](f, s), t)
f.hom(x) ∈ subgroup_image[G, H](f, s)
(forall(x0: H) { not x0 ∈ subgroup_image[G, H](f, s) or x0 ∈ t } = true)

let w0: G satisfy { w0 ∈ s and not w0 ∈ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t) }
function(x0: G) { not x0 ∈ s or x0 ∈ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t) }(w0)

goal: exists(k0: G) { s.contains(k0) and f.hom(k0) = y }
subgroup_subset[G](s, subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t)) = forall(x0: G) { s.contains(x0) implies subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t).contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: Subgroup[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subgroup_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[G](s, subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t))
x ∈ s
(forall(x0: G) { not x0 ∈ s or x0 ∈ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t) } = true)
function(x0: G) { not (x0 ∈ s and not x0 ∈ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t)) }(x)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: Subgroup[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subgroup_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[H](subgroup_image[G, H](f, s), t)
let w0: H satisfy { w0 ∈ subgroup_image[G, H](f, s) and not w0 ∈ t }
function(x0: H) { not x0 ∈ subgroup_image[G, H](f, s) or x0 ∈ t }(w0)

goal: subgroup_subset[H](subgroup_image[G, H](f, s), t) = subgroup_subset[G](s, subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, t))

subgroup_subset[G](s, t) = forall(x0: G) { s.contains(x0) implies t.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: Subgroup[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subgroup_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[G](s, t)
x ∈ s
(forall(x0: G) { not x0 ∈ s or x0 ∈ t } = true)

function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: Subgroup[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subgroup_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[H](subgroup_image[G, H](f, s), subgroup_image[G, H](f, t))

goal: f.hom(g * a * g.inverse) = f.hom(g * a) * f.hom(g.inverse)
f.hom(g * a * g.inverse) = f.hom(g) * f.hom(a) * f.hom(g).inverse

proof: function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0]) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x1 * x2 * x1.inverse ∈ x0 } = is_normal_subgroup[T0](x0) }[G](subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, n))
